name: odbc
label: ODBC
description: ODBC (Open Database Connectivity) allows applications to access data from different database systems (e.g., MySQL, SQL Server, Oracle). It enables interoperability between applications and databases through an ODBC driver.

fields.title: DSN Name
fields.name: dsn_name
fields.description: Specify the Data Source Name to establish the ODBC connection.
fields.tooltip: Specify the Data Source Name to establish the ODBC connection.

fields.title: Auto Commit
fields.name: auto_commit
fields.description: Enable this option to automatically commit each SQL statement after execution without requiring an explicit commit.
fields.tooltip: If enabled, each SQL operation will be committed automatically. Disable it if you want to manage transactions manually.

operations.title: Execute Query
operations.description: Executes a custom SQL query on the connected ODBC data source and returns the result set.

parameters.title: Query
parameters.tooltip: Specify the SQL query string to be executed on the target ODBC database.
parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Specify the SQL query string to be executed on the target ODBC database.
